title: eval_*_test allocates Vec<&Form> to pass as slice
description: evaluator.rs lines 542/565/594: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, eval_envelope_test each begin let refs: Vec<&Form> = forms.iter().collect(). This heap-allocates a Vec of references on every test evaluation solely to satisfy the &[&Form] signature of the extract_* functions. Changing extractor signatures to &[Form] eliminates three per-call heap allocations.
